SOLOMON PANTUCH, Esq., GOLDBERG SEGALLA LLP, 213-415-7200, spantuch@goldbergsegalla.com, for Defendants UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., RASIER, LLC, erroneously sued herein as RAISER, LLC;
